cs-review.subject: Math
cs-review.q: How many degrees are in a right angle?
cs-review.explain: A right angle measures exactly 90 degrees.

cs-review.subject: Science
cs-review.q: What is the closest planet to the Sun?
cs-review.explain: Mercury is the innermost planet of the Solar System.

cs-review.subject: Literature
cs-review.q: What is the term for a word that is opposite in meaning to another word?
cs-review.explain: Antonyms are opposites; synonyms mean the same.

cs-review.subject: History
cs-review.q: Who is widely considered the National Hero of the Philippines?
cs-review.explain: Dr. Jose Rizal is widely regarded as the national hero.

cs-review.subject: Grammar
cs-review.q: What punctuation mark is used at the end of a question?
cs-review.explain: Questions end with a question mark (?).

cs-review.subject: Biology
cs-review.q: What do herbivores primarily eat?
cs-review.explain: Herbivores feed primarily on plants.

cs-review.subject: Physics
cs-review.q: What invisible force keeps planets in orbit around the sun?
cs-review.explain: Gravity holds planets in their orbits.

cs-review.subject: Math
cs-review.q: What is the value of Pi rounded to two decimal places?
cs-review.explain: Pi rounds to 3.14.

cs-review.subject: History
cs-review.q: Who was the first President of the Philippine Republic?
cs-review.explain: Emilio Aguinaldo led the First Philippine Republic.

cs-review.subject: Literature
cs-review.q: Who is the renowned Filipino poet that wrote the epic “Florante at Laura”?
cs-review.explain: Francisco Balagtas wrote Florante at Laura.

cs-review.subject: Geography
cs-review.q: What is the highest mountain above sea level on Earth?
cs-review.explain: Mount Everest is the highest above sea level.

cs-review.subject: Biology
cs-review.q: What part of a plant is primarily responsible for conducting photosynthesis?
cs-review.explain: Photosynthesis occurs mainly in the leaves.

cs-review.subject: Grammar
cs-review.q: What part of speech is used to describe a noun?
cs-review.explain: Adjectives describe or modify nouns.

cs-review.subject: Chemistry
cs-review.q: What two elements make up a molecule of water?
cs-review.explain: Water is H2O: hydrogen and oxygen.

cs-review.subject: Chemistry
cs-review.q: What is the atomic number of Carbon?
cs-review.explain: Carbon's atomic number is 6.

cs-review.subject: Literature
cs-review.q: What is the literary term for a direct comparison between two things using “like” or “as”?
cs-review.explain: A simile compares using 'like' or 'as'.

cs-review.subject: History
cs-review.q: Who was the revolutionary leader famously known as the “Brains of the Katipunan”?
cs-review.explain: Emilio Jacinto was the Brains of the Katipunan.

cs-review.subject: Biology
cs-review.q: What molecule carries the genetic instructions for life in almost all living organisms?
cs-review.explain: DNA stores genetic instructions.

cs-review.subject: Physics
cs-review.q: Which physicist is famous for developing the theory of general relativity?
cs-review.explain: Einstein developed general relativity.

cs-review.subject: Economics
cs-review.q: What economic metric represents the total value of all goods and services produced in a country during one year?
cs-review.explain: GDP measures yearly domestic output.

cs-review.subject: Earth Science
cs-review.q: What is the name of the boundary where two tectonic plates collide?
cs-review.explain: Colliding plates form a convergent boundary.

cs-review.subject: Math
cs-review.q: In a right triangle, what is the term for the longest side opposite the right angle?
cs-review.explain: The hypotenuse is opposite the right angle.

cs-review.subject: Civics
cs-review.q: What are the three co-equal branches of the Philippine government?
cs-review.explain: The three branches are Executive, Legislative, Judicial.

cs-review.subject: Astronomy
cs-review.q: What is the term for a star that suddenly increases greatly in brightness because of a catastrophic explosion?
cs-review.explain: A supernova is an exploding star.

cs-review.subject: Art History
cs-review.q: While most famous for the Spoliarium, which Filipino master painter also created the 1892 masterpiece “The Parisian Life”?
cs-review.explain: Juan Luna painted The Parisian Life (1892).

cs-review.subject: Anatomy
cs-review.q: What is the medical term for the voice box in human anatomy?
cs-review.explain: The larynx is the voice box.
